subcodes.first_line: O Majid! That which thou didst address unto God, thy Lord, hath come before Us, and We have answered thee through this Tablet as a token of mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مجید قد حضر بین یدینا ما نادیت به الله ربک و اجبناک  بهذاللوح  رحمه من
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
